text_block_list.text:
There's still some time before my training session
with Fuji Kiseki, so I decide to take a walk around
campus.

text_block_list.name: Darling Ponies
text_block_list.text:
Aaah!
Fujiii! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: There, that should be good for the lighting.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to the stage, dear pony. Now tell me,
what kind of picture would you like to take
together?

text_block_list.name: Inspired Pony
text_block_list.text:
U-um, I want something really daring! One with
you looking fierce and possessive, please!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I'd much rather spoil you with tender
sweetness...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But if it's the thrill of feral danger you want, then
come. I can be as dastardly and roguish as you'd
like.

text_block_list.name: Darling Ponies
text_block_list.text: Aaaahhh! ♪
choice_data_list: What is she up to now?
What is she up to now?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huehuehue. ♪ If it isn't Fuji's trainer! I can give
you all the deets! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Behold! This is none other than the fan photo op
Fuji set up out of her bottomless magnanimity!
choice_data_list: Whoa! Agnes Digital?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It all started when a particularly passionate fan
asked to see Fuji in her signature racewear close
up.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But of course, my darling pony! Why don't we
take a picture together while we're at it?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That way, you'll forever have a keepsake to
remember when you stood next to me in my
signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Fuji's generosity toward her fans knows no bounds...
choice_data_list: No wonder there's such a long line...
No wonder there's such a long line...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Fuji's practically an A-list celebrity with how
popular she is!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If you want to get a picture with her, you'd better
get in line fast! You never know when the event'll
close!
choice_data_list: Might as well line up since I'm here...
I think I'll just watch.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! ♪ That's the spirit! A picture with her
trainer is bound to pull at the heartstrings! ♪

As I get in line and wait for my turn with Fuji
Kiseki, I reminisce about the day her signature
racewear arrived.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ta-dah! What do you think of my signature
racewear, Trainer?
choice_data_list: It's great! You look just like a stage actor!
It's great! You look just like a stage actor!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I'm glad my uniform's motif came
through so clearly.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My mother's an actor. She's performed and sung
in countless productions, mesmerizing her
audiences.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Since I was a child, her brilliance has burned
bright in my heart. I may not stand on the same
stage as her, but I'm just as determined.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I want to be like her. One day, I want to wear this
outfit and astound everyone with a race so
wonderful it feels like a dream.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's the reason I designed it to look like a tuxedo,
fit for the stage.
choice_data_list:
Then let's build the most amazing stage for you
to stand on in your signature racewear!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Sounds like a plan!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Next in line, plea—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh? What are you doing here, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I wanted to surprise you! Did it work?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! It certainly did! I wasn't expecting you at
all. Come, let's take a picture together!

Fuji Kiseki takes me by the hand and pulls me up
on the stage, where we take a selfie.
choice_data_list: You look even more dazzling than usual.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Perhaps it's because of my signature
racewear.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Wearing this racewear doesn't simply change my
appearance.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It also enrobes me with firm determination and
transforms me into a sublime entertainer, capable
of creating new worlds out of nothing.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I swear to you and upon this racewear of mine...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll charm everyone with a performance so
enthralling—a race so thrilling—they'll never
forget it. And until I do, I'll never stop running.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
When that dream of mine comes true, will you
please be there with me to take another picture
together?

text_block_list.name: Pony Bystander A
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, that was so dreamy! It sounded just like a
marriage proposal!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... A proposal, eh? Well, Trainer? What's
your answer?
choice_data_list: I do—I mean, y-yes, of course I will.

text_block_list.text:
As delighted shrieks ring out from the waiting
crowd around us, I can't help but think that Fuji
Kiseki's charisma is downright dangerous.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so you're the type to watch and support your
faves from afar, eh? That's super valid too!

I watch over Fuji Kiseki until it's time for our
training session, reminiscing about the day her
signature racewear arrived.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ta-dah! What do you think of my signature
racewear, Trainer?
choice_data_list: It's great! You look just like a stage actor!
It's great! You look just like a stage actor!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I'm glad my uniform's motif came
through so clearly.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My mother's an actor. She's performed and sung
in countless productions, mesmerizing her
audiences.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Since I was a child, her brilliance has burned
bright in my heart. I may not stand on the same
stage as her, but I'm just as determined.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I want to be like her. One day, I want to wear this
outfit and astound everyone with a race so
wonderful it feels like a dream.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's the reason I designed it to look like a tuxedo,
fit for the stage.
choice_data_list:
Then let's build the most amazing stage for you
to stand on in your signature racewear!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Sounds like a plan!

I come out of my musings and realize it's nearly
time for our training session to begin.
choice_data_list: Fuji, it's time to get training.
Fuji, it's time to get training.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. I didn't realize it was so late already.

text_block_list.name: Gloomy Pony
text_block_list.text:
Nooo! You're going already? But I wanted to get
a selfie with you!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, dear pony. I wish there was some way I
could make it up to you...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Aha! Trainer, would it be all right if I trained in my
signature racewear today?
choice_data_list: Sure, I don't mind.
Sure, I don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry for having to leave so soon, but I'll run
my heart out for you today in my signature
racewear, darlings. Won't you stay and watch
over me, please?

text_block_list.name: Hopeful Pony
text_block_list.text: Eeek! Of course we will!

text_block_list.name: Darling Ponies
text_block_list.text: Do your best, Fujiii! We love youuu!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, my dear ponies! I'll be off now, so be
good.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
(With this signature racewear and my skills, I'll
lead everyone into a lustrous future, brimming
with never-ending applause! I swear it!)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Keep your eyes on me, Mother. I'll make sure the
future is so bright, its light reaches even your
stage!

Fuji Kiseki runs with renewed resolve, and even if
they don't realize it, her audience is treated to
the glimpse of a miracle that day.
